_readme: The tested source list for the daily bulletin. The keyword engine (google_news_rss) is the backbone and works from the sandbox via web_fetch. The direct_feeds are bonus enrichment. do_not_use are tested-dead — never spend time on them. Validated live 2026-07-14.

google_news_rss.how_to_use: URL-encode the interest keywords into {QUERY} (spaces -> %20). To force recency, append the freshness operator to the query text, e.g. q=fly%20fishing%20when:10d. Each returned <item> has a <title>, <link>, <pubDate> (RFC-822) and <source> (the real publisher). Sort by pubDate and drop anything older than the category's freshness_days as a backstop.
google_news_rss.confirmed: Works via web_fetch AND plain fetch. Returns dated, source-attributed results for any keyword. This is the primary source for every category.

direct_feeds.name: ABC NT News
direct_feeds.note: General NT news — filter for fishing/outdoors/weather-relevant items. May not load via web_fetch; Google News surfaces ABC stories anyway.

direct_feeds.name: NT Independent
direct_feeds.note: WordPress feed; a stray leading <div> may precede the XML — ignore junk before '<?xml'. Some items are subscriber-only.

direct_feeds.name: OzFish
direct_feeds.note: AU habitat/rec-fishing. Also feeds Conservation. May not load via web_fetch.

direct_feeds.name: Wired2Fish
direct_feeds.note: US, high-volume; also feeds Social & Catches. Real per-article dates.

direct_feeds.name: Hatch Magazine
direct_feeds.note: Freshest fly feed — primary for the mandatory daily fly item.

do_not_use._note: Tested dead/blocked/stale on 2026-07-14 — the job must skip these permanently and not rediscover them.
do_not_use.midcurrent.com: Feed valid but ~11 weeks stale — not for a daily item
do_not_use.bassmaster.com feed: Valid envelope but no usable dated items — use Google News 'bass fishing' instead
